about.bio.1: My curiosity spans every dimension of the work I do — from the behavioral psychology behind a user's hesitation at a complex form, to the systems architecture that makes a scalable interaction pattern possible. In regulated, high-stakes environments, problem-solving is not optional; it is the entire job. And every gap in my knowledge becomes the next thing I close.
about.bio.2: Ultimately, it is the combination of technical fluency and clear communication that earns trust across engineering, clinical operations, and executive leadership alike.
about.quote.text: Design is useful function. It untangles complex workflows and provides ease of use that is measurable, and compliant.
about.title: A designer who thrives in complexity
about.value.0.desc: Every regulated workflow is a problem waiting to be understood before it can be simplified.
about.value.0.title: Complexity-led
about.value.1.desc: In enterprise software, the smallest interaction requirement gap becomes the largest downstream failure.
about.value.1.title: Detail-obsessed
about.value.2.desc: Translating regulated complexity to engineering, product, and executive stakeholders is where design earns its seat at the table.
about.value.2.title: Communicator at heart
about.value.3.desc: Design that cannot be measured cannot be defended — every solution is anchored to a success metric and an attribution model.
about.value.3.title: Outcome-driven

modal.project.0.challenge: Within four months of delivery, insights generated by the platform directly informed targeted engagement strategies and operational decisions that reversed a negative profit trajectory. The organization moved from a –17% margin to a +2% margin — demonstrating how thoughtfully applied generative AI, grounded in rigorous UX research and interaction design, can drive measurable enterprise outcomes when anchored to real behavioral data and post-launch measurement frameworks.

modal.project.0.outcome.1: 15% improvement in retention and engagement from actionable behavioral insights surfaced through research-led interaction design.
modal.project.0.outcome.2: 10% increase in average transaction value and user lifetime engagement.
modal.project.0.outcome.3: Reduced onboarding friction by proactively addressing user needs identified through usability research and attribution modeling.
modal.project.0.outcome.4: Scaled organizational awareness across ~40 users spanning operations, strategy, field development, and executive leadership.
modal.project.0.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.0.overview: An AI-assisted behavioral intelligence platform built on live enterprise data — combining structured behavioral, demographic, and operational insights to enable cross-functional teams to understand not just who users were, but how and why they made decisions within complex enterprise workflows.

modal.project.0.quote.text: This platform fundamentally changed how we understand and engage our users. Within four months, it enabled more precise targeting and smarter interactions that helped move our operating margin from –17% to +2%, while strengthening long-term engagement.

modal.project.0.title: AI Persona Agent
modal.project.1.challenge: Architected and led delivery of a comprehensive interaction standards and design system to modernize a fragmented enterprise platform spanning operational, sales, and internal communications workflows. The goal was not only visual renewal — it was a durable system of interaction patterns, component standards, and documented requirements that improved consistency, scalability, and execution speed across the full platform.
modal.project.1.kpi.0.label: Reduction in delivery time
modal.project.1.kpi.1.label: Designers impacted
modal.project.1.kpi.2.label: More design deliverables
modal.project.1.kpi.3.label: Designer hours saved
modal.project.1.outcome.0: Established consistent interaction patterns and visual design specifications across all platform products — eliminating inconsistencies between designers and engineering teams.
modal.project.1.outcome.1: A shared source of truth for interaction requirements clarifying scope, deliverables, and expectations for all design artifacts across the organization.
modal.project.1.outcome.2: Alignment between UX strategy and operational goals by embedding design intent directly into system standards and documented interaction requirements.
modal.project.1.outcome.3: Increased autonomy and confidence of junior and mid-level designers through clear, repeatable, well-documented interaction patterns.
modal.project.1.outcome.4: Earned executive trust by providing visible, consistent interaction standards referenced across all deliverables organization-wide.
modal.project.1.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.1.overview: Delivered as a hybrid greenfield and progressive migration, the system lives in Figma and is referenced directly in the CMS — enabling designers, engineers, and leaders to operate from a shared source of truth for interaction requirements. Adoption materially improved delivery speed, design quality, and team confidence — transforming design from a reactive service into a scalable, strategic enterprise capability.

modal.project.1.quote.text: This system changed how we work. Delivery time was cut by roughly 50%. Interaction quality and visual consistency jumped by about 80%. We went from weeks assembling concepts to delivering clean, standardized prototypes in days. It raised the bar for every project.

modal.project.1.title: Design System Architect
modal.project.2.challenge: Defined the end-to-end experience strategy and interaction design for a complex multi-step workflow — addressing a dual challenge: making it genuinely easy for users to complete a regulated, multi-role process in compliance with organizational requirements, while ensuring they clearly understand the value and next steps at each stage without confusion, friction, or loss of trust.
modal.project.2.kpi.0.label: Target NPS Increase
modal.project.2.kpi.1.label: Workflow Touchpoints Redesigned
modal.project.2.kpi.2.label: Projected Abandonment ↓
modal.project.2.kpi.3.label: Target Completion
modal.project.2.outcome.0: Clarified workflow value proposition at each stage — reducing hesitation and confusion at critical decision points.
modal.project.2.outcome.1: Improved trust and transparency in multi-step flows through clearer interaction patterns, expectations, and guided success states.
modal.project.2.outcome.2: Enabled first-class activation as a primary workflow action rather than an afterthought — reducing drop-off at the highest-friction steps.
modal.project.2.outcome.3: Reduced interaction effort for users advancing through complex multi-role workflow stages.
modal.project.2.outcome.4: Established a scalable workflow framework aligned with long-term retention, compliance, and operational growth goals.
modal.project.2.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.2.overview: This initiative reframes a complex multi-step regulated workflow as a guided progression rather than a transactional gate — aligning interaction design, compliance requirements, and multi-role user needs across all workflow stages. The result is a scalable foundation that improves task completion, reduces abandonment at critical moments, and supports long-term operational efficiency.

modal.project.2.quote.text: By simplifying the workflow journey and aligning it with compliance-based interaction design, we plan to reduce effort at the most fragile points of the process. Early analysis shows faster completion times, higher task success rates at each stage, and improved user confidence.

modal.project.2.title: Complex Workflow Redesign
modal.project.4.challenge: Leading the end-to-end redesign of a high-friction enterprise workflow facing critical efficiency leakage from extreme abandonment exceeding 80%. Declining user trust and interaction flows that diverged significantly from modern enterprise standards positioned this as a business-critical recovery effort — requiring rigorous interaction requirements documentation, usability research, and data-validated design interventions rather than a surface-level visual refresh.

modal.project.4.outcome.1: Reduced cognitive load in multi-step flows by eliminating unnecessary interactions and resolving interaction ambiguity.
modal.project.4.outcome.2: Enabled high-value actions as first-class workflow steps directly within the interaction flow.
modal.project.4.outcome.3: Parity with modern enterprise UX interaction standards — closing the gap with leading workflow platform benchmarks.
modal.project.4.outcome.4: Measurable lift in task success, retention, and trust metrics through isolated, data-validated UX improvements.
modal.project.4.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.4.overview: Restoring user trust, reducing cognitive load, and enabling high-value workflow behaviors through rigorous interaction design — partnering with executive leadership, PMO, and engineering to establish a design-led roadmap that connects every interaction decision to measurable operational and business outcomes.

modal.project.4.title: High-Complexity Workflow Redesign
modal.project.5.challenge: Leading the experience strategy and interaction design for a new enterprise-wide intelligent search system — addressing a critical trust and relevance failure where legacy search returned inaccurate results, forcing users to rely on external tools to find information they needed to do their jobs — directly undermining operational efficiency and user confidence in the platform.
modal.project.5.kpi.0.label: Intelligent Search Results
modal.project.5.kpi.1.label: Result Accuracy
modal.project.5.kpi.2.label: Operational Efficiency Gain
modal.project.5.kpi.3.label: Official Kickoff
modal.project.5.outcome.0: Restore user trust in enterprise search by prioritizing exact, intent-matched results at the highest-visibility positions in the interface.
modal.project.5.outcome.1: Reduce user effort by guiding searches that yield ambiguous or no results — rather than failing silently and forcing workarounds.
modal.project.5.outcome.2: Accelerate information discovery paths through intelligent recommendations and contextual result logic.
modal.project.5.outcome.3: Unify discovery across enterprise content, operational data, support resources, and platform tools into a single, coherent interaction experience.
modal.project.5.outcome.4: Establish search as a strategic operational tool and efficiency lever supporting enterprise-wide workflow performance.
modal.project.5.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.5.overview: Enterprise search is a core operational workflow layer — not a utility. By combining deterministic relevance logic with a custom AI API layer, the new system is designed to deliver exact, high-confidence results, guide users when intent is unclear, and surface contextual information that accelerates task completion and workflow efficiency across the entire platform.

modal.project.5.quote.text: By rebuilding search around relevance and intent rather than keywords alone, we potentially reduce friction at the earliest stage of the operational workflow. Early validation shows faster time-to-information, clearer paths to task completion, and meaningful efficiency gains across platform workflows.

modal.project.5.title: AI-Driven Enterprise Search
